Has fallado la prueba","msgTrueFalseHelp":"Di si la afirmación es verdadera o falsa","msgDropdownHelp":"Elige la respuesta correcta entre las opciones propuestas","msgFillHelp":"Rellena los espacios en blanco con la palabra apropiada","msgSingleSelectionHelp":"Opción múltiple con solo una respuesta correcta","msgMultipleSelectionHelp":"Opción múltiple con varias respuestas correctas","msgPlayStart":"Pulse aquí para empezar","msgTrue":"Verdadero","msgFalse":"Falso","msgNext":"Siguiente","msgPrevious":"Anterior","msgSuggestion":"Sugerencia"},"id":"20260502135753957W8Z","questionsRandom":false,"percentageQuestions":"100","time":"0","eXeFormInstructions":"

Read the questions, choose and think. 

","questionsData":[{"id":"1777724292361-QNEYI","activityType":"fill","baseText":"

1. Food and Fuel. 
Why do we say that food is like fuel for our body?
a) Because it tastes good
b) Because it gives us energy
c) Because it is expensive
What happens to a car if it has no fuel?

2. Healthy vs Unhealthy Choices. 
Which of these foods gives your body better “fuel”?
a) Fruit and vegetables
b) Sweets and soda
c) Chips every day

3. Energy and Daily Life.

How do you feel when you eat a healthy meal?

a) Tired
b) Energetic
c) Sleepy

4. Hydration
What is the best drink to keep your body working well?
a) Water
b) Soda
c) Energy drinks

","feedbackRight":"","feedbackWrong":"","suggestion":"","wrongAnswersValue":"","selectionType":"single","answers":[],"answer":"1","capitalization":true,"strict":true,"order":0,"customScore":1,"time":0}],"passRate":5,"addBtnAnswers":true,"eXeIdeviceTextAfter":"","showSlider":false}

Has fallado la prueba","msgTrueFalseHelp":"Di si la afirmación es verdadera o falsa","msgDropdownHelp":"Elige la respuesta correcta entre las opciones propuestas","msgFillHelp":"Rellena los espacios en blanco con la palabra apropiada","msgSingleSelectionHelp":"Opción múltiple con solo una respuesta correcta","msgMultipleSelectionHelp":"Opción múltiple con varias respuestas correctas","msgPlayStart":"Pulse aquí para empezar","msgTrue":"Verdadero","msgFalse":"Falso","msgNext":"Siguiente","msgPrevious":"Anterior","msgSuggestion":"Sugerencia"},"id":"202605021520005477LF","questionsRandom":false,"percentageQuestions":"100","time":"0","eXeFormInstructions":"

Responde a las preguntas del cuestionario

","questionsData":[{"id":"1777728231037-TPTXH","activityType":"fill","baseText":"

Look at the photos carefully and answer the questions.

\n

1. Basic Information
What country is the family from?
______________________________________
How many people are in the family?
 ______________________________________
 
2. Food Observation
What types of food can you see? (fruit, vegetables, fast food, meat, drinks…)
 ______________________________________
Is the food mostly healthy or unhealthy?
______________________________________
Name three foods you can see:
 1. __________ 2. __________ 3. __________
 
3. Comparison
Is this diet similar to your diet?
 Yes / No
Why?
______________________________________
Which food is very different from what you usually eat?
______________________________________
 
4. Reflection
Do you think this family has a balanced diet?
 ______________________________________
What would you change to make their diet healthier?
 ______________________________________
 
5. Personal Opinion
Which family diet do you like the most? Why?
 ______________________________________

","feedbackRight":"","feedbackWrong":"","suggestion":"","wrongAnswersValue":"","selectionType":"single","answers":[],"answer":"1","capitalization":true,"strict":true,"order":0,"customScore":1,"time":0}],"passRate":5,"addBtnAnswers":true,"eXeIdeviceTextAfter":"","showSlider":false}
